brand.name: AgentX
brand.industry: Developer infrastructure — AI agent orchestration / control plane
brand.audience: Platform operators and developers running, benchmarking, and integrating AI agent workloads — some of which process regulated / student / PII data

audienceRegulation._note: SkoolScout context — K-12 / student data flows through agent jobs. Implies: guardian-consent flows in auth/profile templates, stricter a11y baseline (WCAG 2.2 AA min, aim AAA on text), age-appropriate language, data-handling disclosures in legal template, audit-trail surfacing in detail/list templates.

a11y._note: Primary button fill = accent-600 (white text AAA). Dark-mode CTA promotes to accent-300 with dark text. danger-500 fill-only; body error text → danger-600+.

colors._note: Cyan accent (hue ≈ 208°) on navy primary; dark-first. OKLCH-generated ramps, WCAG 2.2 AA+ verified. colors.pen render deferred to Phase 4 (needs foundations .pen as foreground Pencil tab).

typography.loadingNote: Self-host: .woff2 in controlplane-ui/public/fonts/, @font-face in packages/design-system/src/fonts.css (imported before theme.css), preload Inter body weight only; JetBrains Mono loads non-blocking.
typography._note: UI base size 14px (dense console). Type scale (--font-h1 … --font-code-sm) written by foundations:typography render.

icons._pairing: Sharp Solid — squared terminals echo Inter's geometry.
icons._setup: FA Pro kit: `npm config set "@awesome.me:registry" https://npm.fontawesome.com/` + `//npm.fontawesome.com/:_authToken=$FONTAWESOME_NPM_AUTH_TOKEN`, then `npm i @awesome.me/kit-<id>/icons @fortawesome/react-fontawesome`. Token in dev + CI env, not committed.
icons._penNote: Pencil's native icon node does NOT support Font Awesome (lucide/feather/Material Symbols/phosphor only). FA glyphs enter .pen via foundations:icons-select's FA rendering (SVG/font embedding). Keep the .pen icon usage in sync with this map so design + code never diverge.

darkMode._note: TWO LAYERS — don't conflate. (1) Design-system TOKEN default is LIGHT: colors.lib.pen's `themes` axis is ordered [light,dark] (first = default) and theme.css puts light at :root with dark gated behind `.dark`; an unpinned .pen screen renders light. (2) `default: dark` here = the APP's shipped appearance, NOT the token default — controlplane-ui opts into dark via <html class="dark"> (long-look monitoring favors dark). So dark-first is delivered at the app layer on top of a light-default token system; `supported: true` keeps the light base reachable.

imagery._note: Icon-led empty/error/success states; Hero Patterns @ ~5% for backdrops. Refined by foundations:imagery-select / render. assets.* generated then.

meta._architecture: Build the component library as the canonical IMPORTED library at product/design/design-system.lib.pen; screens compose from it via the Pencil imports map (NOT embedded in-file). Cross-file imports map wiring requires the Pencil desktop app (MCP batch_design can't set document.imports).
